shop.order.awaiting_payment_notice: The payment has not been completed yet. You can try the payment again from here.
shop.order.cannot_pay_yet: This order cannot be paid yet.
shop.order.waive_installation_invalid: The request can only be canceled while we wait for the quote.
shop.payment.provider_error: Payment could not be initiated with the supplier. Please try again later or contact us.
shop.payment.method_unavailable: This payment method is not available. The administrator must configure the gateway on the server.
shop.payment.paypal_payment_not_found: The payment was not found or you do not have permission to complete it.
shop.payment.paypal_order_mismatch: PayPal order does not match this payment.
shop.payment.paypal_capture_failed: Payment with PayPal could not be confirmed. Please try again or contact us.
shop.payment.paypal_oauth_failed: PayPal rejected server credentials (wrong Client ID or Secret, or Live app used in Sandbox mode). Check PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID, PAYPAL_SECRET and PAYPAL_MODE in .env and copy the full values ​​again from the PayPal Developer panel.
shop.payment.paypal_credentials_format_i: PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID seems incomplete: on PayPal it is usually a long string (~80 characters). Copy the full Client ID from Apps & Credentials (Sandbox or Live) and the corresponding Secret.
client_portal.solution_not_found: This request was not found or is no longer valid.
client_portal.admin_notify_no_email: There is no valid email to send the notification.
validation.min: The value must be at least :min characters.
admin.data_explorer.errors.invalid_table: The selected table is not available.
admin.data_explorer.errors.invalid_date_: The date column is not valid.
admin.data_explorer.errors.invalid_value: The numeric column to calculate is not valid.
admin.data_explorer.errors.invalid_metri: The metric must be count, sum, or avg.
shop.personalized_solutions_disabled: We are not accepting new custom solution requests at the moment.
